textPlain: This looks amazing, I've been shopping for an implementation of this I could play around with for a while nowThey mention promising results on Apple Silicon GPUs and even cite the contributions from Vello, but I don't see a Metal implementation in there and the benchmark only shows results from an RTX 2080. Is it safe to assume that they're referring to the WGPU version when talking about M-series chips?
That and https://github.com/b0nes164/GPUSorting have been a tremendous help for me, since CUB does not nicely work with the Cuda Driver Api. The author is doing amazing work.
We'll put that link in the top text too. Thanks!
this is missing the most important one (in today's world): extracting non-zero elements from a sparse vector/matrixhttps://developer.nvidia.com/gpugems/gpugems3/part-vi-gpu-co...
